root_text.an5.126:1.3: Asappāyakārī hoti, sappāye mattaṁ na jānāti, apariṇatabhojī ca hoti, dussīlo ca, pāpamitto ca.
root_text.an5.126:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca dhammā anāyussā.
root_text.an5.126:2.3: Sappāyakārī hoti, sappāye mattaṁ jānāti, pariṇatabhojī ca hoti, sīlavā ca, kalyāṇamitto ca.
root_text.an5.126:2.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca dhammā āyussā”ti.

translation_text.an5.126:1.3: Doing what is unsuitable, not knowing moderation in what is suitable, eating food unfit for consumption, unethical behavior, and bad friends.
translation_text.an5.126:1.4: These are the five things that impede longevity.
translation_text.an5.126:2.3: Doing what is suitable, knowing moderation in what is suitable, eating food fit for consumption, ethical conduct, and good friends.
translation_text.an5.126:2.4: These are the five things that promote longevity.”
